intended_use: PeekMed web is a system designed to help healthcare professionals carry out pre-operative planning for several surgical procedures, based on their imported patients' imaging studies. Experience in usa
intended_use_full: PeekMed web is a system designed to help healthcare professionals carry out pre-operative planning for several surgical procedures, based on their imported patients' imaging studies. Experience in usage and a clinical assessment is necessary for the proper use of the system in the revision and approval of the output of the planning. The multi-platform system works with a database of digital representations related to surgical materials supplied by their manufacturers.
target_condition: Orthopedic surgical cases requiring pre-operative planning in musculoskeletal system (Hip, Knee, Upper limb, Foot procedures)
ground_truth: Predefined ground truth created through manual annotation by qualified personnel; for external validation, a fully independent dataset labeled by a separate team was employed
other_metrics: Segmentation - DICE: ≥90%, HD-95: ≤8, STD DICE: ±10%, Precision: >85%, Recall: >90%; Landmarking - MRE: ≤7mm, STD MRE: ±5mm; Classification - Accuracy: ≥90%, Precision: ≥85%, Recall: ≥90%, F1 score: ≥90%; Detection - MAP: ≥90%, Precision: ≥85%, Recall: ≥90%
